## Overview

The commander of [[fort-ashby|Fort Ashby]] is a weathered human who has held the post for a decade. They answer nominally to the [[order-of-mending]].

## Appearance

Grey-templed, left hand missing two fingers.

## Relationships

Trusted by the garrison; distrusted by merchants who pass through.
